results.question:
Identify the agent with the fewest transfer counts in the last 4 quarters among those who handled more than 0 cases. Return only the Id of the agent.

## Transfer Count Policy
- Definition: The number of instances a case was reassigned or transferred from one agent to another. Each transfer from agent A to agent B adds to the transfer count for agent A.
- In the queries that specify 'agents managed/queries x cases' -- this filter applies to both the first agent that the case was first assigned to and the agent that the case was transferred to. This means that if an agent has 2 cases that was initially assigned to itself by admin and 1 case transferred from another agent, a filter like 'handled/managed at least 3 cases' would not filter this agent out.
- For cases that have NOT been transferred to an other agent, there will be only ONE 'Owner Assignment', and for those that have been transferred, there will be MORE THAN ONE 'Owner Assignment'.

WITH parsed AS (
  SELECT "Index",
    COALESCE(
      TRY_STRPTIME("Date", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'),
      TRY_STRPTIME("Date", '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'),
      TRY_STRPTIME("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'),
      TRY_STRPTIME("Date", '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'),
      TRY_STRPTIME("Date", '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'),
      TRY_STRPTIME("Date", '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S')
    ) AS dt,
    "CloseUSD"
  FROM index_trade
),
monthly AS (
  SELECT "Index", DATE_TRUNC('month', dt) AS month,
    FIRST("CloseUSD" ORDER BY dt) AS open_price,
    LAST("CloseUSD" ORDER BY dt)  AS close_price
  FROM parsed
  WHERE dt IS NOT NULL AND "CloseUSD" IS NOT NULL AND "CloseUSD" > 0 AND dt >= TIMESTAMP '2000-01-01 00:00:00'
  GROUP BY "Index", DATE_TRUNC('month', dt)
)
SELECT "Index", SUM(close_price / open_price - 1) * 100 AS total_return
FROM monthly
GROUP BY "Index"
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 12*5
ORDER BY total_return DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH eligible_tickers AS (
  SELECT 'AGMH' AS ticker UNION ALL
  SELECT 'AMTX' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'APEX' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'BIOC' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'BKYI' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'CBAT' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'CCCL' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'CORV' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'CPAH' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'DZSI' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'FAMI' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'FTFT' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'FTR' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'IDEX' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'ISDS' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'MCEP' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'NXTD' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'OPTT' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PEIX' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'RBZ' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'SES' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'SNSS' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'SPI' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'SYPR' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'VTIQW'
)
SELECT t.ticker, AVG(CAST(s."Volume" AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_volume_2008
FROM eligible_tickers t
JOIN (
  SELECT 'AGMH' AS ticker, "Date", "Volume" FROM AGMH
  UNION ALL SELECT 'AMTX', "Date", "Volume" FROM AMTX
  UNION ALL SELECT 'APEX', "Date", "Volume" FROM APEX
  UNION ALL SELECT 'BIOC', "Date", "Volume" FROM BIOC
  UNION ALL SELECT 'BKYI', "Date", "Volume" FROM BKYI
  UNION ALL SELECT 'CBAT', "Date", "Volume" FROM CBAT
  UNION ALL SELECT 'CCCL', "Date", "Volume" FROM CCCL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'CORV', "Date", "Volume" FROM CORV
  UNION ALL SELECT 'CPAH', "Date", "Volume" FROM CPAH
  UNION ALL SELECT 'DZSI', "Date", "Volume" FROM DZSI
  UNION ALL SELECT 'FAMI', "Date", "Volume" FROM FAMI
  UNION ALL SELECT 'FTFT', "Date", "Volume" FROM FTFT
  UNION ALL SELECT 'FTR', "Date", "Volume" FROM FTR
  UNION ALL SELECT 'IDEX', "Date", "Volume" FROM IDEX
  UNION ALL SELECT 'ISDS', "Date", "Volume" FROM ISDS
  UNION ALL SELECT 'MCEP', "Date", "Volume" FROM MCEP
  UNION ALL SELECT 'NXTD', "Date", "Volume" FROM NXTD
  UNION ALL SELECT 'OPTT', "Date", "Volume" FROM OPTT
  UNION ALL SELECT 'PEIX', "Date", "Volume" FROM PEIX
  UNION ALL SELECT 'RBZ', "Date", "Volume" FROM RBZ
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SES', "Date", "Volume" FROM SES
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SNSS', "Date", "Volume" FROM SNSS
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SPI', "Date", "Volume" FROM SPI
  UNION ALL SELECT 'SYPR', "Date", "Volume" FROM SYPR
  UNION ALL SELECT 'VTIQW', "Date", "Volume" FROM VTIQW
) s ON t.ticker = s.ticker
WHERE COALESCE(
  TRY_STRPTIME(s."Date", '%Y-%m-%d'),
  TRY_STRPTIME(s."Date", '%m/%d/%Y'),
  TRY_STRPTIME(s."Date", '%Y/%m/%d'),
  TRY_STRPTIME(s."Date", '%d-%b-%y'),
  TRY_STRPTIME(s."Date", '%d-%b-%Y')
) BETWEEN DATE '2008-01-01' AND DATE '2008-12-31'
AND s."Volume" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY t.ticker
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

results.question: Which business received the highest average rating between January 1, 2016 and June 30, 2016, and what category does it belong to? Consider only businesses with at least 5 reviews.
results.agent_answer: Coffee House Too Cafe, Breakfast & Brunch

args.sql:
SELECT business_ref, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count
FROM review
WHERE COALESCE(
    TRY_STRPTIME(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'),
    TRY_STRPTIME(date, '%Y-%m-%d'),
    TRY_STRPTIME(date, '%m/%d/%Y'),
    TRY_STRPTIME(date, '%Y/%m/%d'),
    TRY_STRPTIME(date, '%B %d, %Y'),
    TRY_STRPTIME(date, '%b %d, %Y')
) BETWEEN DATE '2016-01-01' AND DATE '2016-06-30'
GROUP BY business_ref
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, business_ref ASC
LIMIT 1;
